name: ao3-comment-previewer
description: Standalone live preview + sanitizer for AO3 comment HTML — paste rich text or raw HTML, see it rendered as it would appear as an AO3 comment.

scripts.build: rm -rf build && mkdir -p build/css build/vendor build/js && cp index.html build/ && cp src/css/*.css build/css/ && cp src/vendor/*.css build/vendor/ && tsc
